results.title: 1 dead in Coquitlam house fire, RCMP say
results.description: 18-year-old treated at scene, police officer sent to hospital for smoke inhalation

results.title: South Okanagan General Hospital ER to close overnight Tuesday (Oliver/Osoyoos)
results.description: The South Okanagan General Hospital emergency room will once again be closing Tuesday overnight. From Tuesday at 5 p.m. until Wednesday at 7 a.m., emergency services at the Oliver hospital will not be available. Patients can access emergency care at Penticton Regional Hospital, and all other i...

results.title: Read Missoula County's opposition to federal grant changes
results.description: The county said in a letter to the Trump Administration that the federal grant changes would create "severe fiscal uncertainty" by giving the executive branch more authority over awardees.
